results.title: U.S. pounds Iran with airstrikes after 2 American troops killed by Iranian attack in Jordan
results.description: President Trump ordered another wave of U.S. airstrikes against Iran early Sunday following an Iranian attack on a base in Jordan that killed at least two American troops. The two sides are now barreling toward all-out war, if they're not there already, after a brief ceasefire fell apart earlier this month. ...

results.title: Salman Khan's latest appearance at a Mumbai event leaves fans worried
results.description: Salman Khan's latest appearance has ignited discussions among fans concerning his health status. Many fans couldn't help but reminisce about his significant battles with trigeminal neuralgia—a condition that causes excruciating facial pain. He has opened up about the severe pain and difficulties he faced while eating. Fortunately, a gamma knife surgery brought him considerable relief. Nonetheless, he has remained silent about his current health condition.

results.title: No private hospital transfer for Sonam Wangchuk as court upholds forcible removal
results.description: The Delhi High Court states that at Safdarjung Hospital, Sonam Wangchuk has been administered only oral interventions deemed necessary in light of his ‘deteriorating’ condition, although without his consent.

results.title: Toxic Tate brothers arrested in Miami on rape and sex trafficking charges
results.description: The brothers were taken into custody by the US Marshals Service on a sealed warrant, agency spokesperson Brady McCarron told The Associated Press, placing the United States at the centre of an international legal saga that has stretched from Romania to Britain

results.title: TG Minister Seethakka
results.description: ఎల్‌నినో ప్రభావంతో రాష్ట్రంలో తీవ్ర నీటి ఎద్దడి ఏర్పడే అవకాశం ఉంది. ఈ నేపథ్యంలో పంచాయతీరాజ్ శాఖ మంత్రి డి. సీతక్క అప్రమత్తమయ్యారు. ఈ క్రమంలో జిల్లా కలెక్టర్లకు ఆమె కీలక ఆదేశాలు జారీ చేశారు.
